recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: Whistle
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object, an ancient Aztec Death Whistle. They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down.

recommendations.title: Tentacles
recommendations.genres: Horror, Romance, Science Fiction, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A young Los Angeles couple Tara and Sam fall head over heels into a new romance, entwining their lives—until their intimacy transforms into something terrifying.

recommendations.title: And Soon the Darkness
recommendations.overview: Two young English women go on a cycling tour of the French countryside. When one of them goes missing, the other begins to search for her. But who can she trust?

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: Son
recommendations.overview: When a young boy contracts a mysterious illness, his mother must decide how far she will go to protect him from terrifying forces in her past.

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
recommendations.overview: As New York City is invaded by alien creatures who hunt by sound, a woman named Sam fights to survive with her cat.
